description: Scope control and grounded verification with indexing, metadata, and grounded QA

features.name: Window Launch
features.description: Electron app opens a BrowserWindow with correct dimensions and preload script
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document List Panel
features.description: Left sidebar shows imported documents with empty state message
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Question Panel
features.description: Bottom input bar accepts questions and submits via IPC
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Data Directory
features.description: PersistenceService creates and manages userData/knowledge-base-data directory
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document Import
features.description: Users can import .txt and .md files via ImportPanel with file picker
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document Detail with Content
features.description: DocumentDetail shows full document content, metadata, and delete button
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Basic Persistence
features.description: Imported documents persist across app restarts via filesystem storage
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document Chunking
features.description: IndexingService splits documents into ~500 char chunks at paragraph boundaries with metadata
features.evidence: IndexingService.chunkDocument() splits on paragraph boundaries, merges paragraphs until ~500 chars, creates Chunk objects with charCount/wordCount metadata. Verified: indexing:start IPC creates chunks/<docId>.json files.

features.name: Metadata Extraction
features.description: On import, extract word count, line count, file type, and paragraph count metadata from documents
features.evidence: DocumentService.importDocument() calls extractMetadata() to compute wordCount, lineCount, fileType, paragraphCount, charCount. Document metadata field populated on import. DocumentDetail displays metadata section.

features.name: Indexing Status in StatusBar
features.description: StatusBar shows indexing progress with indexed count, total chunks, and color-coded status indicator
features.evidence: StatusBar component renders indexedCount/totalChunks, color-coded dot (idle=gray, indexing=yellow, ready=green, error=red). App.tsx polls indexing.status() on refresh. AppStatus type includes indexedCount and totalChunks fields.

features.name: Grounded Q&A with Citations
features.description: QaService returns answers with document citations, excerpts, and confidence scores
features.evidence: QaService.ask() retrieves chunks via IndexingService.getAllChunks(), scores by keyword overlap, returns top 2 as citations with documentId/documentTitle/chunkIndex/excerpt. Mock patterns generate contextual answers. Confidence: 0.85 with citations, 0.30 without.
